hero.title: Debrecen's home of authentic Hungarian comfort food.
hero.subtitle: Daily lunch menus on weekdays, generous family platters by pre-order, and event catering — served with heart and tradition.

story.title: A table where everyone is welcome
story.p1: At Kajüt Vendéglő we believe the true value of Hungarian cuisine lies in homestyle flavours and generous portions. In the heart of Debrecen on Kishegyesi út, we created a place where families, colleagues, and friends can sit down together for a real Hungarian lunch.
story.p2: Our daily menu is prepared from fresh ingredients every weekday. Our platters are made to order — because the best food doesn't wait, it's made fresh for you.

items.quote: 10/10 delicious. Fresh and generous every time.
items.author: Regina

items.quote: The best daily menu in the area. Quick, friendly, homestyle.
items.author: Tamás

items.quote: The Kajüt platter has become our family gathering favourite.
items.author: Ildikó

visit.title: Find us in Debrecen
visit.hoursDetail:
Tue–Fri: 11:30–15:00
Saturday: Pre-order only
Monday & Sunday: Closed

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: A restaurant where everyone feels at home
aboutPage.intro: At Kajüt Vendéglő we believe the best Hungarian cuisine doesn't follow trends — it preserves tradition, served fresh, generously, and with heart.

homestyle.title: Homestyle flavours
homestyle.description: The feeling of home cooking on every plate.

community.title: Community

kitchen.title: Our kitchen
kitchen.description: We work with fresh ingredients every day. Our daily menu follows the seasonal weekly offering, and platters are prepared individually to order — because freshness is non-negotiable.
